text: Now let me update requirements.txt with the target fixed versions and test-install in the scratch venv.

input.command:
cp requirements.txt /tmp/requirements.txt.bak && cp requirements.in /tmp/requirements.in.bak
python3 - <<'EOF'
import re
path = "requirements.txt"
with open(path) as f:
    content = f.read()

bumps = {
    "pillow==10.1.0": "pillow==12.2.0",
    "pymysql[rsa]==1.0.2": "pymysql[rsa]==1.1.1",
    "werkzeug==2.0.3": "werkzeug==3.1.6",
    "cryptography==40.0.2": "cryptography==48.0.1",
    "urllib3==1.26.20": "urllib3==2.7.0",
    "mako==1.1.3": "mako==1.3.12",
    "flask==2.0.3": "flask==3.1.3",
    "idna==2.10": "idna==3.15",
    "pydantic==1.6.2": "pydantic==1.10.13",
    "requests==2.32.3": "requests==2.33.0",
    "python-dotenv==0.13.0": "python-dotenv==1.2.2",
}
for old, new in bumps.items():
    assert old in content, old
    content = content.replace(old, new)

with open(path, "w") as f:
    f.write(content)
print("done")
EOF

Check cffi requirement across cryptography versions
List cryptography 40.0.2 vulnerabilities and fix reasons

input.command:
cd /tmp/pkgcheck && for v in 45.0.0 45.0.4 45.0.6 46.0.0 46.0.1 46.0.2 46.0.3; do
  /tmp/scratch-venv/bin/pip download --no-deps -d . "cryptography==$v" >/tmp/dl2_$v.log 2>&1
done
python3 -c "
import zipfile, glob
seen=set()
for whl in sorted(glob.glob('cryptography-*.whl')):
    z = zipfile.ZipFile(whl)
    for n in z.namelist():
        if n.endswith('METADATA'):
            content = z.read(n).decode()
            lines=[l for l in content.splitlines() if l.startswith('Requires-Dist: cffi')]
            print(whl, '->', lines)
"
